summary: Update mode testing complete. Tested new Smart RTL simulation features including Smart RTL button, speed slider (range 0.1-5.0), HUD overlay with altitude/speed/phase/progress, and speed control panel. All 21 backend tests passed, all 24 frontend tests passed (12 map-simulation, 7 core-flows, 5 route-history).
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Smart RTL simulation features tested and working. Speed slider controls simulation speed (0.1-5.0), Smart RTL button starts RTL mode, HUD overlay displays altitude/speed/phase/progress during simulation. Phase indicators show RECORD->HIGH_ALT->DESCENT->LOW_ALT->LANDING. Documentation contains real device images for Mateksys H743-Slim V3, MATEK 3901-L0X, and TF-Luna.

Tab navigation switches between all 6 tabs
About section displays project info with sensors specs
Telemetry tab displays sensor monitoring dashboard

Simulation buttons visible and functional (including Smart RTL)
New route button loads new route
Map stats display keyframes and distance
Auto-save toggle is visible and functional
